MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-23-2025 Set For Case Management Conference On Dec-03-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion For Entering Judgment Pursuant To Defendants Default Under Settlement And Release Agreement
Off Calendar Sep-09-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Jefferson Capital Systems LLC's unopposed Motion For Entering Judgment Pursuant To Defendants Default Under Settlement And Release Agreement is GRANTED.

Plaintiff moves under Code of Civil Procedure section 664.6. Good cause appearing, judgment shall be entered as requested in the moving papers.

No later than 8:30 am on September 9, 2025, Moving Party must submit; (1) a proposed order providing the motion is granted that verbatim quotes the above and, separately; (2) a proposed judgment consistent with the request in the moving papers. Moving Party shall send the proposed order and proposed judgment by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org.

No proposed order received. Plaintiff failed to provide and follow the court's order.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
